category_sources: Official rsync site at https://rsync.samba.org/ describes rsync as an open source utility for fast incremental file transfer.
source_facts.description says it provides fast incremental file transfer.
display_name_sources: Official homepage at https://rsync.samba.org/ uses the name rsync.
docs_sources: Official rsync documentation page lists official manpages, FAQ, and resources.
Official rsync site links the latest rsync(1) manpage.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README states the git repo is hosted on GitHub and Samba's site.
Official rsync download page says the latest source can be browsed/cloned from rsync's GitHub page.
tags_sources: Official documentation covers rsync, rsync-ssl, rsyncd.conf, and rrsync manpages.
source_facts.description identifies fast incremental file transfer.
